text: Ethan's lacrosse game starts at 6, coach just confirmed. Any chance you're out of the clinic by 5:30?
Last patient slots out at 4:45. I'll be there. Tell him.
He's gonna be so pumped 😂 Also Lily already called Zaxby's after, just warning you now.
She gets it if homework's done before we leave. That's the deal, non-negotiable.
Already told her. Did you actually eat this morning? You left before I was even up.
Smoothie at 5:15 — whey, banana, the whole thing. I'm good. See y'all at 6.
Hit a 385 back squat at the 5:15 class this morning. New PR. Didn't see that coming on a Monday 💪
no way. I thought you said you were dragging last week? how much sleep did you even get
7 hours. Creatine's been dialed in lately. Karen thinks I'm obsessed but the numbers don't lie.
haha she's not wrong. think I should add creatine? been hitting the gym way more this semester
5g/day, don't overthink the loading phase. Get your protein up first — you actually eating enough or just guessing
probably guessing lol. what do you put in your smoothie again, the banana spinach one
Dad did you seriously post a reel of you doing 5:15am snatches with a caption about 'earning your coffee' 😭 you have patients
It's called inspiration Lily. Also yes I earned it. Chemex was waiting.
Mom said you almost dropped the bar on your foot. That's not inspiring that's a liability for your own PT clinic lol
Controlled descent. Completely intentional. Tell your mother to stay off my Instagram.
Are you coming to my recital Thursday or are you gonna be 'in a training block' again like you told Ethan
I'll be there. Front row. Tell me the time and I'll move the 6pm eval.
Ethan's lacrosse game starts at 6, coach just confirmed. Any chance you're out of the clinic by 5:30?
Last patient slots out at 4:45. I'll be there. Tell him.
